tasks.rules:
define Target {_id: null,deleted: null,type: null,pass: null,date: null}define Contact {contact: null,reports: null}define Task {_id: null,deleted: null,doc: null,contact: null,icon: null,date: null,title: null,fields: null,resolved: null,priority: null,priorityLabel: null,reports: null,actions: null}rule GenerateEvents {when {c: Contact}then {var idx1,idx2,r,target,now=Utils.now();function isFormSubmittedInWindow(e,t,a,r,i){var n=!1,s=0;return e.forEach(function(e){!n&&0<=t.indexOf(e.form)&&e.reported_date>=a&&e.reported_date<=r&&(s++,(!i||e.fields&&e.fields.follow_up_count>i||i<=s)&&(n=!0))}),n}function isChildUnder5(e){if(e.contact&&e.contact.date_of_birth){var t=new Date(e.contact.date_of_birth),a=new Date(now-t.getTime());return Math.round(a/2592e6)<60}return!1}function countReportsSubmitted(e,t){return e&&e.reports?e.reports.filter(function(e){return e.form===t}).length:0}function hasGivenConsent(e){var t='',a=[];e&&e.reports&&0<(a=e.reports.filter(function(e){return'infant_child'===e.form&&e.fields&&e.fields.consent&&''!==e.fields.consent.child_consent_today})).length&&(t=Utils.getMostRecentReport(a,'infant_child').fields.consent.child_consent_today);return t}function isSmallBaby(e){var t,a=[];e&&e.reports&&0<(a=e.reports.filter(function(e){return'infant_child'===e.form&&e.fields&&e.fields.first_visit_6_months&&''!==e.fields.first_visit_6_months.small_baby_today})).length&&(t=Utils.getMostRecentReport(a,'infant_child').fields.first_visit_6_months.small_baby_today);return t}function referralMade(e){return'1'===e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby||('1'===e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag||('1'===e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag||('1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag||('1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_palm_pallor_flag||('1'===e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag||'1'===e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag)))))}function getReferralReasons(e){var t='';return'1'===e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_flag_small_baby
'),'1'===e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag
'),'1'===e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_child_danger_sign_flag
'),'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_muac_flag
'),'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_palm_pallor_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_palm_pallor_flag
'),'1'===e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_vaccines_flag
'),'1'===e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag
'),t}var targets=[],tasks=[{icon:'child',title:'task.infant_child',appliesTo:'contacts',appliesIf:function(e){return console.log('Logging from first infant-child task ...',e),e.contact.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent.parent&&isChildUnder5(e)},appliesToType:['person'],actions:[{form:'infant_child',modifyContent:function(e,t){t.child_consent=hasGivenConsent(e),t.num_child_visits=countReportsSubmitted(e,'infant_child'),t.small_baby=isSmallBaby(e)}}],events:[{id:'infant_child_first_visit',days:0,start:0,end:21}],resolvedIf:function(e,t,a,r){return isFormSubmittedInWindow(e.reports,'infant_child',Utils.addDate(r,-a.start).getTime(),Utils.addDate(r,a.end+1).getTime())}},{icon:'followup-general',title:'task.referral_follow_up',appliesTo:'reports',appliesIf:function(e,t){return console.log('Logging from referral follow-up task ...',e),e.contact.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent.parent&&referralMade(t,'infant_child')},appliesToType:['infant_child'],actions:[{form:'referral_follow_up',modifyContent:function(e,t,a){t.last_visit_date=r.reported_date,t.referral_reasons=getReferralReasons(a)}}],events:[{id:'referral_follow_up',dueDate:function(e){return Utils.addDate(e.reported_date,3)},start:1,end:3}],resolvedIf:function(e,t,a,r){return isFormSubmittedInWindow(e.reports,'referral_follow_up',Utils.addDate(r,-a.start).getTime(),Utils.addDate(r,a.end+1).getTime())}}];for(idx1=0;idx1
